summary: Soundboard recording marred by four audible pops during “The Other One”, with no other commentary on performance
review: The sole review flags a technical flaw: four noticeable pops between 1:30‑1:40 in the middle of “The Other One” that could not be removed. No musical observations are provided, so the show’s quality remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review focusing on a recording defect; no positive or neutral comments about performance to raise the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Four audible pops between 1:30‑1:40 in “The Other One”; reviewer notes they could not be removed.
